Metadata.title: Toko Trading - International Trade and Sourcing
Metadata.description: Toko Trading offers international trade, import, export, and sourcing services based in Turkey.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Toko Trading is your trusted partner in international trade and sourcing.

NotFound.title: Page Not Found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved.

HomePage.title: Your Reliable Partner in
HomePage.subtitle: With over 20 years of experience, we manage your import, export, and sourcing processes. Grow your business with our trade network spanning 50+ countries.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Professional support at every stage of international trade

import.title: Import Services
import.description: Raw material and product sourcing from around the world. Comprehensive import solutions including customs procedures, logistics management, and cost optimization.

export.title: Export Services
export.description: Product export from Turkey to global markets. Market research, buyer matching, and export documentation support.

sourcing.title: Sourcing Solutions
sourcing.description: We provide products at the best price and quality through our global supply network. Supplier auditing and quality control services.

transit.title: Transit Trade
transit.description: Transit trade operations through Turkey to third countries. Specialized solutions especially for Russia and CIS countries.

whyUs.title: Why Toko Trading?
whyUs.subtitle: The values that make the difference in international trade

experience.title: Deep Industry Experience
experience.description: We add value to your trade with over 20 years of knowledge accumulated across different sectors.

network.title: Global Trade Network
network.description: Strong business partnerships and supply chains established in over 50 countries.

transparency.title: Transparent Processes
transparency.description: You are informed at every stage. Full transparency in customs, logistics, and payment processes.

support.title: 24/7 Customer Support
support.description: Our expert team is always by your side. Uninterrupted support for your questions and needs.

global.title: Global Reach
global.subtitle: A trade bridge extending from Turkey to the world
global.description: With our strong business network in Europe, Asia, Africa, and the Middle East, we take your business to new markets. We have deep expertise especially in Russia, CIS countries, and North African markets.

ctaSection.title: Let's Grow Your Trade
ctaSection.description: Contact us now for your international trade needs. Our expert team is ready to create solutions tailored to you.
